description: Aimfox is a LinkedIn outreach tool that scales lead generation with rented profiles, automation, and a unified inbox.
tagline: Scale LinkedIn outreach with rented profiles
overview: Aimfox automates and scales LinkedIn outreach, letting teams run campaigns across rented profiles and manage every conversation from one unified inbox.
what_is: Aimfox is a LinkedIn outreach tool for lead generation and sales teams. It automates and scales LinkedIn campaigns, and its standout feature is letting users run outreach across rented LinkedIn profiles to scale beyond normal limits, with a unified inbox for managing all conversations.

It suits lead-gen agencies, sales teams, and GTM operators who want fast, automated outreach that still reads as human, with quick setup. Aimfox integrates with other sales and marketing tools as a pipeline and conversation layer, complementing rather than replacing a CRM or email platform.
